title: Twisha Sharma death: BCI suspends bar licence of accused-husband Samarth Singh
description: The Bar Council of India (BCI) on Friday suspended advocate Samarth Singh from legal practice citing serious allegations linked to the death of his wife Twisha Sharma.The interim order was passed by BCI Chairman Manan Kumar Mishra pending further consideration of the issue by its disciplinary body.The BCI noted that a first information report (FIR) has been registered against Singh and others on allegations including dowry death and cruelty. It further recorded that he was reportedly absconding
